allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma migrate dev --name add-motivo-llamado)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $id = $_.Id; $cmd = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$id" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine; [PSCustomObject]@{PID=$id; CMD=$cmd} } | Format-List)
Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma migrate dev --name add-pedido-edicion)
Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma db execute --file prisma/add_pedido_edicion.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma db execute --file prisma/fix_pedido_edicion_item.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma)
Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma migrate diff --from-migrations prisma/migrations --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script)
Bash(pnpm --filter @menyu/api exec prisma migrate dev --name nullable_sesion_cliente_id --skip-seed)
